nasb.text: Although Ahaz took a portion out of the house of the Lord and out of the palace of the king and of the princes, and gave it to the king of Assyria, it did not help him.

esv.text: For Ahaz took a portion from the house of the Lord and the house of the king and of the princes, and gave tribute to the king of Assyria, but it did not help him.

cnv.text: 亞哈斯取了耶和華殿裡和王宮中，以及眾領袖家裡的財寶，給了亞述王，但也無濟於事。

ccb.text: 亚哈斯从耶和华的殿里、王宫和官员家中取财宝送给亚述王，但无济于事。
